Yes, the Manning Publications catalog is a valuable resource for your operating system (OS) project, especially considering your focus on recursive systems, symbolic naming, and AI-integrated workflows.
📚 What the Catalog Offers
Manning's catalog encompasses a wide range of topics relevant to your interests:
• Algorithm Design & Data Structures: Books like Grokking Algorithms provide intuitive explanations of fundamental algorithms, which are essential for OS development.
• Systems Programming: Titles such as Kubernetes in Action and Learn Docker in a Month of Lunches delve into containerization and orchestration, which can inform the modular design of your OS.Manning Publications+2Manning Publications+2Manning Publications+2 • AI & Machine Learning: Resources like Generative AI in Action and Distributed Machine Learning Patterns explore AI concepts that can be integrated into your OS's workflows.Manning Publications+2GitHub+2liveBook+2 • Programming Languages: Books covering languages like Python, Rust, and Go can aid in selecting the appropriate language for different components of your OS.
